occupation: Marketing Team Lead at Facility Management Group (FMG)
headline: MBA | PMI-ACP® | Agile Certified Practitioner | Marketing Team Leader
summary:
Hello! I'm an experienced Marketing Project Manager with a strong background in marketing communications and budgeting. I bring a wealth of experience and expertise to effectively manage projects and deliver successful outcomes.
In addition to my skills in goal achievement and making a positive impact on businesses, I have extensive experience in marketing communications and budgeting. I excel in developing and implementing comprehensive marketing communication strategies that effectively convey brand messages and engage target audiences. I have a proven track record of executing successful marketing campaigns across various channels, including traditional and digital platforms.
Furthermore, I have a keen eye for budgeting and financial management in marketing projects. I possess a deep understanding of cost optimization, resource allocation, and ROI analysis, ensuring that projects are delivered within budgetary constraints while maximizing impact and generating measurable results.
With my combined expertise in marketing communications and budgeting, I am equipped to drive strategic initiatives that align with business objectives and deliver tangible value.

experiences.title: Marketing Project Manager
experiences.description: Developing and executing project plans for marketing initiatives, including defining project goals, tasks, timelines, and budgets. Managing and coordinating the implementation of marketing projects, ensuring adherence to timelines and budgets. Collaborating with cross-functional teams, including marketing, creative, and product teams, to align project objectives and deliverables. Managing project risks and developing strategies to address potential issues. Monitoring project progress, tracking key milestones, and providing regular updates to stakeholders. Managing project budgets, monitoring expenses, and ensuring projects are delivered within allocated resources. Facilitating effective communication among team members and stakeholders. Conducting project evaluations to assess performance and identify areas for improvement. Staying updated on industry trends and utilizing innovative approaches to project management.

experiences.title: Senior Marketing Communications Specialist
experiences.description: Setting the strategic direction for traditional marketing across the company. Leading and managing marketing teams and projects. Conducting market analysis and competitor research to identify new opportunities. Making strategic decisions regarding budget allocation and resource distribution. Managing budgets, including analyzing ROI (Return on Investment) for marketing activities. Establishing and maintaining relationships with vendors and partners. Keeping abreast of industry trends and advancements in traditional marketing strategies.

experiences.title: Leading Marketing specialist
experiences.description: Developing and implementing strategic traditional marketing plans. Managing and coordinating traditional marketing campaigns, including print, radio, television, and outdoor advertising. Organizing and overseeing events, exhibitions, and conferences. Conducting TV and radio placements, including participating in commercial shoots. Analyzing and evaluating the performance of traditional marketing channels. Managing relationships with suppliers and external agencies.

experiences.title: Marketing specialist
experiences.description: Assisting in the development and execution of traditional marketing campaigns. Conducting market research and competitor analysis. Supporting the creation and editing of marketing materials. Assisting with managing social media content and online platforms. Monitoring and reporting on the effectiveness of traditional marketing activities. Collaborating with cross-functional teams. Assisting with event planning and promotions. Staying updated on traditional marketing trends and strategies.

experiences.title: Personal Assistant to CEO
experiences.description: Providing comprehensive support to the CEO, managing all incoming and outgoing correspondence. Organizing meetings, including scheduling, agenda preparation, and coordinating logistics. Handling appointment scheduling, ensuring efficient calendar management. Coordinating travel arrangements, including booking flights, accommodations, and arranging ground transportation. Managing confidential documentation, maintaining a high level of discretion and confidentiality. Preparing reports and presentations, ensuring accurate and timely delivery of information. Performing various administrative tasks, such as data entry, file management, and expense tracking.
